channel.title: AIIB Job Vacancies
channel.description: Current job opportunities at Asian Infrastructure Investment Bank (AIIB)

item.title: Counsel - Public Sector Operations
item.description: AIIB has a vacancy for the position of Counsel - Public Sector Operations. Location: Beijing, China. Closing date: May 04, 2026.

item.title: Investment Officer - Financial Institutions - West Asia / Non-Regional Members
item.description: AIIB has a vacancy for the position of Investment Officer - Financial Institutions - West Asia / Non-Regional Members. Location: Beijing, China. Closing date: May 09, 2026.

item.title: Senior Secretariat Officer
item.description: AIIB has a vacancy for the position of Senior Secretariat Officer. Location: Beijing, China. Closing date: Apr 30, 2026.

item.title: Operational Risk Associate
item.description: AIIB has a vacancy for the position of Operational Risk Associate. Location: Beijing, China. Closing date: Apr 24, 2026.

item.title: Senior Communications Officer - Media
item.description: AIIB has a vacancy for the position of Senior Communications Officer - Media. Location: Beijing, China. Closing date: Apr 24, 2026.

item.title: Senior Ethics Officer - Head of Investigation/Prevention
item.description: AIIB has a vacancy for the position of Senior Ethics Officer - Head of Investigation/Prevention. Location: Beijing, China. Closing date: Apr 24, 2026.

item.title: Counsel - Private Sector Investment & Treasury Operations
item.description: AIIB has a vacancy for the position of Counsel - Private Sector Investment & Treasury Operations. Location: Beijing, China.

item.title: Senior Economist - Climate Policy, Regulatory and Institutional Reforms (for pooling only)
item.description: AIIB has a vacancy for the position of Senior Economist - Climate Policy, Regulatory and Institutional Reforms (for pooling only). Location: Beijing, China.
